en: Where are you going, Cass? Cass, come on, not this again.
This? This was the last time, Wade.
Is that what you do? Pack your bags and leave every time there's a storm?
It's easy when things are easy, Cass. It's a lot harder to get through life when things get difficult,
but damn it, it's worth it. I ain't leaving because I've given up.
I'm leaving because I've given enough.
